title: After the Shuka Sho: The View Beyond

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaaaahh!!!!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Desire…! That feeling of "I want to win"…
"I have to win"… It's piercing straight into my
heart! It hurts… but—!)

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"Bueeena Vistaaaaaa!!"
"Buenaaaaaa!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …!! Haaaaaaaaaaahhhh!!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's Red Desire! The one who conquered this
fierce battle is… Red Desire!! She claims
victory in the Shuka Sho!
(Wooaaaaaahhhh—!!)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Now is the time to reach that place. Everyone… please take care.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …I see. Even this… still isn't enough…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Just how many trials must I overcome…
before I can finally reach it?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Ordinarily, one would despair here. But I am
different… aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…I give thanks. For granting me yet another
trial. For through it… I may become an even
greater saint.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Now then, the next race awaits. My beloved
is waiting for me there…♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Desire… You were really strong…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Congratulations! …C-Congratulations…!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
"Buena Vistaaaaa!!"
"You did a great job too!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"This year's Tiara races were so much fun
because of you!"
"Thank you for such a moving experience!"
"Buena, you're the best!!"

Buena Vista looks around her. No matter whose
fan they are, they still cheer and applaud her
for fighting to the very end…
It was such a warm… and a beautiful sight.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(…It's not over yet, is it? I want to feel
everyone's happiness even more…! …Next
time, through victory.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyone!
Thank you… so much!!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Haahh… Buena Vista was incredible. Even I
got a little emotional watching that…

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right!? I totally get it…!! Even the way Buena
runs feels so earnest… and on top of that, she's
got that angel-like charm!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She just makes you want to cheer for her!
She's gonna be huge next year too… Let's
keep supporting her like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: …She is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. It seems… we've gained another
delightful companion on this road.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Don't go messing around with her, got it? She's my prey.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention of doing that. I'm well
aware… she won't be an easy opponent.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I couldn't claim that final title.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry……
choice_data_list: …But it was still a beautiful sight.
…But it was still a beautiful sight.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! You felt that way too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It was such a beautiful view… that it almost
made me think… if I'd won, it would've become
a true spectacular view. And that's what hurts
so much….

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So… I'm not going to stop here.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't reach the spectacular view of the
Triple Tiara. But… if it's us, we can still go
farther.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We can find an even greater spectacular
view…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! A spectacular view that burns itself into
everyone's eyes… that reaches all the way to
the depths of their hearts, let's aim for that
again!

Buena Vista's eyes sparkle brightly. Her dream
is far from over. If anything, her heart has
already begun walking toward the next horizon.
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's go see an even greater view!
Yeah. Let's go see an even greater view!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But… what do we need to do to see an even
greater spectacular view?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
A spectacular view that's truly ours. Something
even greater than what we saw today…
choice_data_list: Something unlike Spe's Japan Cup too…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Trainer, I think you're right!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's go watch the Japan Cup. That race
is where our dream began… Don't you think
there might be a clue waiting there?
choice_data_list: Then… you're not planning to run in it?
Then… you're not planning to run in it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to experience it the same way
I did back then… from the perspective of
"everyone" watching together. Without that
feeling, it wouldn't really be our dream.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to go beyond what we reached
today, then I want to witness it properly with
my own eyes!
choice_data_list: Got it. Then what should our next race be…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Okay! How about the Arima Kinen?

The Arima Kinen is the year-end Grand Prix
race. A stage where horsegirls worthy of
representing their era gather to answer the
expectations of their fans.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So many people supported me, right? Their
voices gave me strength. I have to repay them
for that!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown runners… the
senior-class too… I'm sure it'll be a tough
field. But…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. I believe that too!
And so, the next goal is set: the Arima Kinen!
